it:108.2: This was said by the Blessed One, said by the Arahant, so I have heard:
it:108.3: "Any monks who are deceitful, stubborn, talkers, frauds, arrogant, and uncentered are not followers of mine. They have turned away from this Dhamma and Vinaya. They attain, in terms of this Dhamma and Vinaya, no growth, increase, or abundance.
it:108.4:
"But any monks who are not deceitful, not talkers, who are enlightened, pliant, and well-centered: they are followers of mine. They have not turned away from this Dhamma-&-Vinaya. They attain, in terms of this Dhamma and Vinaya, growth, increase, and abundance.
Deceitful, stubborn, talkers, frauds, arrogant, uncentered: they don't grow in the Dhamma taught by the Rightly Self-awakened One.
it:108.5: Not deceitful, not talkers, enlightened, pliant, well-centered: they grow in the Dhamma taught by the One Rightly Self-awakened.
it:108.6: This, too, was the meaning of what was said by the Blessed One, so I have heard.
